description: Composition Charcoal grey and white sleeveless striped round neck T-shirt made of 100% viscose cotton, has a racer back, graphic print and embellishments and an assymetrical A-line hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach Use warm iron, do not iron on print arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This printed T-shirt is a glamourised version of the striped tee with its slim silhouette and graphic print. Pair it with richly hued denims, sky high heels and a vest. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
